African-American and Africana Studies Major

Course Title

Credits

Five courses at the 300 or 400 level are required. There must be at least one course in Cluster 1 and one in Cluster 2 15

Cluster 1

A list of upper-level cluster courses that will meet this requirement is available on the AAAS department website each semester.
